top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a1.element) = 2 AND 
             'Cl' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) AND 
             'C' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) 
        THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS result
FROM atom a1
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a1.element) = 2 AND 
             SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND 
             SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
        THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS has_both
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a1.element) = 2 AND 
             'Cl' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) AND 
             'C' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) 
        THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS result
FROM atom a1
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM connected c
            JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
            JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
            WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8'
              AND ((a1.element = 'Cl' AND a2.element = 'C') OR (a1.element = 'C' AND a2.element = 'Cl'))
        ) THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS result;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM bond b
            JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
            JOIN atom a1 ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
            JOIN atom a2 ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2
            WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8' 
              AND ((a1.element = 'Cl' AND a2.element = 'C') OR (a1.element = 'C' AND a2.element = 'Cl'))
        ) THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS has_both;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a1.element) = 2 AND 
             'Cl' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) AND 
             'C' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) 
        THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS result
FROM atom a1
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (
            SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.element) 
            FROM bond b
            JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
            JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id IN (c.atom_id, c.atom_id2)
            WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8'
              AND a.element IN ('Cl', 'C')
        ) = 2 THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS has_both;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM connected c
            JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
            JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
            WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8'
              AND ((a1.element = 'Cl' AND a2.element = 'C') OR (a1.element = 'C' AND a2.element = 'Cl'))
        ) THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS result;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a1.element) = 2 AND 
             'Cl' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) AND 
             'C' IN (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_1_8')) 
        THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS result
FROM atom a1
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8';
